text:
How-To-Repeat: 
% man -k psignal
psignal(3), strsignal(3), sys_siglist(3), sys_signame(3) - system signal message
s
psignal(9), -(9)         - #include <sys/types.h> #include <sys/signalvar.h> psi
gnal, pgsignal, gsignal post signal to a process or process group
r
